contacts.title: Owner Operator / Director
contacts.other_contact_detail: Groups & events enquiry form at https://templarlondon.com/groups ("Enquire Now" routes to team for bookings, private hire, and commercial discussions)
contacts.fit_reason: Owner with full influence over commercial strategy, revenue-tech, booking systems, guest experience tools and automation for the venue including group events and reservations.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Confirmed as co-founder/owner operator of Templar wine bar/restaurant and sister venue Darkhorse via multiple independent news articles and personal LinkedIn. No personal email/phone/X found after searching official site, news, LinkedIn and Companies House-related records. Venue relies on web enquiry form for all group and commercial contact. Limited additional named team members publicly listed due to small independent hospitality operation (scarcity noted).

evidence.quote_or_fact: Ian Goodman - owner operator Bar/Restaurants Darkhorse, Templar. E20 F&B Ltd.
The restauranteurs, Ian Goodman & Lee Glenn behind Darkhorse and Templar
Our event team is ready to help plan your event... Enquire Now

contacts.title: Director / Co-Owner
contacts.company: E20 F&B Ltd (Templar Restaurant Wine Bar)
contacts.other_contact_detail: Groups & events enquiry form at https://templarlondon.com/groups ("Enquire Now" routes to team for bookings, private hire, and commercial discussions)
contacts.fit_reason: Co-owner/director with influence over overall operations, revenue strategy, guest comms, and technology decisions for booking automation and guest experience at Templar.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Identified as co-restaurateur and director of Templar and Darkhorse in news coverage and LinkedIn. Quotes in articles reference operational details. No direct personal contact details located. Public data on team is sparse for this independent venue (scarcity noted across all contacts).

contacts.title: General Manager
contacts.other_contact_detail: Groups & events enquiry form at https://templarlondon.com/groups (likely reaches GM/operations for reservations and commercial ops)
contacts.fit_reason: General Manager with day-to-day responsibility for operations, reservations, guest experience, staff, and likely evaluates revenue-tech, booking automation and guest messaging solutions.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Referenced as "Jonny – our General Manager" in founder interview discussing wine list and venue operations. Strong operational role confirmation tied to ICP areas but full name and personal contacts not publicly detailed. Enquiry form provides route to management. Overall scarcity of named contacts across property, regional, IT, revenue, sales & marketing roles in public sources for this small independent venue.

evidence.quote_or_fact: Jonny – our General Manager – who also loves wine.

contacts.title: Head Chef
contacts.other_contact_detail: Groups & events enquiry form at https://templarlondon.com/groups; F&B operations contact likely routed here
contacts.fit_reason: Leads F&B and guest experience with small plates/sharing concept; plausible input on guest messaging, CRM for diners, and experience-tech that touches booking/automation indirectly.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Multiple articles name him as Head Chef / culinary lead for Templar, previously at Terra, Lardo and Pied à Terre. Strong role confirmation but no personal contact channels or LinkedIn located in searches. Contributes to overall ICP relevance via guest experience. Public team listings remain very limited (scarcity noted).
